expectations.text: Denominator via ALLSELECTED on product, slicers respected, per-row product filter lifted
expectations.evidence: Uses CALCULATETABLE(...,REMOVEFILTERS('Product'[Product Name])) -- achieves same goal (per-row lifted, Year/Region/Category kept); differs from ALLSELECTED only if a Product-Name slicer exists

expectations.text: Virtual product table with [Gross Sales] via context transition
Cumulative = sum of sales for products with sales >= current (threshold logic)
Captures current product's Gross Sales in a VAR (threshold)
